caption: A man with short brown hair wearing a grey t-shirt is seen in a video overlay on the left side of a screen showing a Madden NFL video game interface. The interface displays a player card for "TAYSOM HILL" with an overall rating of "95" and a position of "TE". On-screen text includes "AUCTION DETAILS," "Max Value: 2,181,500," and "Current Bid: 424,300." The card's description states "MUT 2s Zero Old Champion. This player comes with 2 Custom Abilities..." and identifies the archetype as "Vertical Threat." The man's facial expression changes from a wide, open-mouthed smile and laughter in the first two frames to a more neutral, closed-mouth expression in the final two frames. The game screen remains static, showing the same auction details and player statistics, while the man's head moves slightly within his video frame.
